title: TaranNova Wine Glass 6x340ml - Crystal Clear Wine Globets Set for Parties, Weddings & Christmas - Elegant Stemware, Durable & Dishwasher Safe/ (340ml)
features: ✅ PREMIUM QUALITY GLASS – Made from high-quality, durable glass that is crystal clear and long-lasting for everyday use.
✅ GENEROUS CAPACITY – Each glass holds 340mml, perfect for serving water, juice, cocktails, smoothies, and more
✅ ELEGANT & MODERN DESIGN – Sleek, tall, and stylish highball glasses that enhance the look of your dining table or kitchen.
✅ VERSATILE USAGE – Ideal for home, restaurants, cafes, parties, and special occasions.
✅ SET OF 6 GLASSES - Includes six tall drinking glasses, perfect for families or gatherings.
description: Bring style and elegance to your table with this Set of 6 Wine Water Glasses, designed to suit all your beverage needs. Each glass features a 340ml capacity, perfect for serving water, juice, milk, cocktails, mocktails, soft drinks, smoothies, or any cold beverage of your choice. Crafted from premium quality clear glass, these highball glasses are not only visually appealing but also sturdy and long-lasting. Their tall and slim design ensures a comfortable grip, while the crystal-clear transparency allows you to showcase the vibrant colors of your drinks beautifully. These glasses are versatile and practical, suitable for both everyday family use and elegant dinner settings. Whether you are hosting parties, entertaining guests, or simply enjoying a refreshing drink at home, these glasses add a touch of sophistication to any occasion.
